stemHtml: The crew of a jet aeroplane are calculating their take-off performance, preparing to depart from a contaminated runway. They wish to increase the MTOM, and note that they are VMCG limited. What can they do to increase the take-off performance?

options.a: A reduced thrust take-off to increase V1.
options.b: A reduced thrust take-off to decrease V1.
options.c: A derated thrust take-off to decrease V1.
options.d: A derated thrust take-off to increase V1.
